morning: Morning, {{name}}. The lake's not gonna fish itself.
{{name}}, the coffee's hot and the lake is calm. Get out there.
Good morning, {{name}}. Dibs on the first shower.
Rise and shine, {{name}}. The sun's already on the dock.
Morning, {{name}}. Pancakes or eggs? Choose wisely.
{{name}}, the loons are up. Your turn.
Good morning, {{name}}. Another day in paradise.
Morning, {{name}}. Who forgot to close the screen door last night?
{{name}}, the fog is rolling off the lake. Go look.
earlyAfternoon: {{name}}, the lake is calling. Are you gonna answer?
Hey {{name}}. Boat ride or beach? Clock's ticking.
Afternoon, {{name}}. Perfect time for a lake nap.
lateAfternoon: It's 5 o'clock somewhere. Oh wait, it is here too.
{{name}}, the sun's going down and the drinks are going up.
{{name}}, golden hour on the lake. Grab a drink and a chair.
Sun's getting low, {{name}}. Time to crack one open.
{{name}}, the sunset's about to go off. Front row seats on the dock.
{{name}}, it's that magic hour. Drinks on the dock.
The grill should be heating up. Just saying, {{name}}.
{{name}}, the pontoon isn't going to sunset cruise itself.
evening: {{name}}, the stars are coming out. So should you.
Good evening, {{name}}. S'mores or no s'mores? Trick question.
{{name}}, fire's going. Pull up a chair.
Evening, {{name}}. The mosquitos send their regards.
{{name}}, the lake looks like glass right now. Go see it.
Good evening, {{name}}. Firewood check: are we good?
lateNight: It's late, {{name}}. One more won't hurt... right?
{{name}}, the loons are judging you. Go to bed.
Late night, {{name}}. Tomorrow-you is gonna have opinions about this.
{{name}}, the stars are nice but your bed is nicer.
You're still up? The raccoons are impressed, {{name}}.
middleOfNight: {{name}}, it is 100% bedtime. Go to sleep.
{{name}}. Why are you awake right now?
The lake is sleeping. You should be too, {{name}}.
{{name}}, nothing good happens after 3am. Go to bed.
Put the phone down, {{name}}. The itinerary will be there in the morning.
{{name}}, even the fish are asleep right now.
Go to sleep, {{name}}. The bonfire is long dead.
{{name}}, this is your sign to close your eyes.
It is unreasonably late, {{name}}. Pillow. Now.
{{name}}, tomorrow is going to be rough if you don't sleep.
The stars are beautiful but your pillow is calling, {{name}}.
{{name}}, the raccoons finished their shift. You should too.
preTrip: Hey {{name}}. {{days}} days until we leave. Not that anyone is counting.
{{name}}, start making your list. You will forget something.
{{name}}, have you started packing yet? Be honest.
Almost time, {{name}}. Can you feel it?
{{name}}, {{days}} days. The group chat is about to get intense.
Hey {{name}}. Do NOT forget the bug spray this year.
{{name}}, the lake is waiting. {{days}} more days.
Getting close, {{name}}. Time to start neglecting responsibilities.
{{name}}, {{days}} days. Who is bringing the cornhole set?
postTrip: {{name}}, the vacation is over but the memories are forever. And the expenses.
{{name}}, real life hits different after the lake.
Post-vacation {{name}}. How are we holding up?
Hey {{name}}. Remember when we didn't have responsibilities?
Back at it, {{name}}. But the photos live on.
{{name}}, that was a good one. Start the countdown to next year.

tripContext.soonDays: {{days}} days out. Don't forget the sunscreen.
tripContext.farAway: {{days}} days to go. Start the countdown.
tripContext.lastDay: Last day. Make it a good one.
tripContext.justHome: Just got home. Reality hits different.
tripContext.postTrip: {{days}} days since vacation. Withdrawal symptoms kicking in yet?

topPayer: {{name}} is carrying {{pct}}% of the tab. Legend.
{{name}} is bankrolling this trip at {{pct}}%. Someone buy them a drink.
{{name}} has paid {{pct}}% of everything. MVP status.
{{name}} out here covering {{pct}}% of the damage. Respect.
biggestDay: {{day_name}} was a ${{amount}} day. Nobody's talking about it.
${{amount}} on {{day_name}} alone. That's a new record.
biggestExpense: ${{amount}} on "{{title}}". Someone had to do it.
The ${{amount}} "{{title}}" is carrying this trip's expense total.
expenseCount: {{count}} expenses and counting. The receipts don't lie.
{{count}} expenses logged. We're keeping it honest.
{{count}} expenses so far. That's a lot of lake living.
We've logged {{count}} expenses. The accountant in the group is thriving.
avgExpense: Average expense: ${{amount}}. That's a lot of appetizers.
Average spend: ${{amount}} per expense. Sounds about right for up north.
${{amount}} average expense. Gas station runs add up.
Running ${{amount}} per expense. The lake life isn't cheap.

messages: Give it time. Someone's gonna buy a round.
The first receipt is always the hardest.
Someone make a grocery run already.
It's only a matter of time.
The lake store is calling.
The good, the bad, and the embarrassing.
Someone take a picture. This won't last forever.
The sunsets aren't gonna photograph themselves.
Future blackmail material goes here.
Proof it happened or it didn't.

titles: The itinerary is a blank canvas
messages: Add something before everyone just naps all day.
Someone needs to be the planner. Step up.
The lake isn't going to schedule itself.
Wing it? Or plan it? Your call.
An empty itinerary is a cry for help.
Someone's gotta plan the fun around here.
The lake is waiting. Create a trip.
Every great vacation starts with someone clicking a button.

expenseDeleted: Deleted. We'll never speak of it.
expenseUpdated: Updated. The math checks out now.
itineraryDeleted: Removed. It had a good run.
photoUploaded: {{count}} photo{{s}} uploaded. The evidence is in.

messages: The tab doesn't lie, but we can make it disappear.
Gone forever. Unless someone re-adds it.
Are you sure? The receipt says otherwise.
This expense is about to cease to exist.
It had a good run.
Not every idea makes the cut.
We hardly knew ye.
Sometimes less is more.
You'll need a new login code to get back in.
We'll keep your seat warm.
The lake will miss you. Also you'll need a new code.

clear: Blue sky all day. No excuses.
perfectDay: This is why we come up north.
Clear skies and warm water. Get in.
This is the day everyone back home is jealous of.
Peak lake weather. Don't waste it inside.
Weather like this doesn't happen by accident.
hotClear: Hot and sunny. The lake is your air conditioning.
Scorcher with clear skies. Stay wet.
It's a beach day. No debate.
Sun's out full force. Sunscreen and water. Both.
Clear and hot. The floating life chose you.
scorching: It's brutal out there. Do not leave the water.
Heat wave. Hydrate like your life depends on it.
This hot? The lake is the only answer.
Even the fish are looking for shade.
hot: It's a scorcher. Stay in the water.
Jump in the lake. Doctor's orders.
Heat advisory: apply sunscreen and get wet.
Too hot for anything except floating.
coolClear: Clear skies but bring a layer. It's brisk.
Sunny and cool. Perfect hiking weather actually.
Blue sky but don't let it fool you. It's chilly.
Cool for summer but the sun is trying.
Hoodie and sunshine. Classic up north combo.
It's a pretty day. Just a cold pretty day.
cold: Chilly but the fresh air is worth it.
freezing: It's genuinely cold. Bonfire is non-negotiable tonight.
This is aggressive for vacation weather.
Hot chocolate kind of day. In July. Sure.
The lake is gonna feel like an ice bath.
partlyCloudy: A few clouds, but nothing to worry about.
Partly cloudy. Still a great day.
Some clouds rolling in. The lake doesn't care.
overcast: Overcast but still beautiful up here.
Cloud cover. Good fishing weather actually.
fog: Foggy out there. The lake is hiding.
Can't even see the water. It'll burn off.
Fog on the lake. Very mysterious.
Visibility is low. Stay close to shore.
rain: Rain day. Board games it is.
Wet out there. Perfect nap weather.
Grab a book and a blanket.
Rain on the roof. Actually kind of nice.
The fish are biting in the rain. Just saying.
rainCold: Cold rain. This is a movie day.
Rainy and chilly. Fire up the fireplace.
Cold and wet. Worst combo. Best nap weather.
Rain plus cold. Cards, coffee, and zero guilt.
Not going anywhere today. And that's fine.
This is what the cabin was built for.
thunderstorm: Thunder and lightning. Stay off the lake.
Storm rolling through. Movie marathon time.
Thunder up north hits different. Enjoy from inside.
snow: Unexpected snow. Build a snowman I guess.
Snow on the lake. That's a new one.
nice: This is why we come here.
Weather like this doesn't happen by accident.

taglines: Everything for the trip. Nothing else.
One app. One lake. No drama.
Sunsets, expenses, and everything in between.
